capacity_evidence.device_allocator_probe: Full visible MeshShape(1,4): raw DRAM allocator capacity is 34178731008 bytes/device. With trace_region_size=100000000 bytes/bank, ttnn.get_memory_view reports 8 banks and 33378731008 usable bytes/device; the trace reservation is 800000000 bytes/device.
capacity_evidence.formula: KV/device: 32 layers * 2 local KV heads * 131072 aggregate positions * 128 head_dim * 2 (K,V) * dtype storage. BFP8 uses 1088 bytes per 1024-element tile. Projection weights/device retain both accepted phase layouts: 981467136 prefill + 981467136 decode bytes. The full-model persistent formula additionally includes tile-padded decoder norms, TP4 row-major embedding, final norm, BFP8 TP4 LM head padded to vocab 131072, one shared BF16 TILE RoPE pair for prefill, one shared BF16 row-major RoPE pair for decode, batch-1 position indices, invalid-vocab mask, Sampling1D exact-greedy/stochastic buffers, and the shared 1 MiB minimal-all-reduce pool. Fresh hardware measurement reports 2534929408 bytes allocated/device after full weights and 4816630784 after adding the exact full-context BFP8 cache, a delta of 2281701376 bytes matching the tile formula. Plan totals add the measured persistent weight allocation, selected cache, 800 MB/device trace reservation (100 MB per bank), and batch-1 page table. The BF16 split uses the same accepted shape with exact BF16 storage accounting and still leaves 26.5 GB/device raw-allocator headroom. No advertised-context reduction is needed.
capacity_evidence.allocator_policy: A 2048-block pool can be assigned entirely to one 131072-token request or shared across a batch. Inputs are chunked/logical tensors and are not required to materialize batch*max_context as one persistent allocation.
capacity_evidence.stage_scope: The full autoregressive model preserves the advertised logical context and optimized TP4 paged-cache layout. Hardware gates cover full-stack 32-layer prefill/decode; a real one-layer 131071-token non-divisible public generation with all 2048 pages and inspected final-page K/V data; the exact 131072-token prompt/one-output boundary; mixed prompts, fixed slots, inactive rows, trace replay; and both accepted BFP8 and compatibility BF16 cache capacity plans.

notes: TP=4 quarters KV-head ownership and projection-weight storage per device relative to a dense single-device layer. Logical sequence lengths remain unaligned at the API boundary; tile and final-page padding are internal. The model has no MoE experts.

classification.multichip_contract: arbitrary logical sequence length in [1, max_cache_len]

classification.cache_layout: contiguous or 64-token paged, two local KV heads per device

ir_provenance.translation: The optimized single-chip dense graph is the numeric baseline. The full-mesh path restores the compiler-selected TP ownership as Q8/KV2 per rank, column-sharded QKV/gate/up, row-sharded O/down, and two BF16 asynchronous sums per layer.

dtype_policy.functional_baseline: BF16 weights and activations; TILE layout; DRAM memory by default
dtype_policy.optimized_decoder: BFP4 projection weights with LoFi projection math; BF16 activations and norms; BF16 and BFP8 caller-owned KV caches
dtype_policy.multichip_decoder: Same optimized projection policy per rank; BF16 residual in 16-core width-sharded L1 across layer boundaries and BF16 minimal-all-reduce payload; KV cache is sharded by head with two local heads per device
dtype_policy.full_model: BFP4/LoFi optimized decoder projections; BF16 activations, residuals, norms, CCL payloads, final logits, and invalid-vocabulary mask; BFP8/HiFi2 TP4 LM-head weights; BFP8 paged KV cache by default with explicit BF16 compatibility selection; Sampling1D exact local-argmax plus packed FP32 rank-candidate gather on device.
dtype_policy.rejection_ledger: Preserved from optimized_multichip_decoder: BF16 projection weights, BFP8 CCL payloads, packed gate/up, alternate advisor geometries, link=1, and non-minimal all-reduce remain rejected. Full-model terminal rejection: full-vocabulary force-argmax all-gather is comparison-only because canonical exact greedy communicates only one value/token packet per rank; non-semantic ttnn.sampling(k=1) is also rejected.
